headline: settings-integrity warning gives correct guidance for untracked .claude/settings.local.json

bullets: settings-integrity: when the SessionStart drift warning fires for .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored, untracked), it no longer tells you to run 'git diff -- .claude/settings.local.json' — that produced empty output and misled you. The warning now checks whether the file is tracked by git: tracked files keep the git-diff hint; untracked files get pointed at the file directly with a 'no committed baseline' note.
